---
title: "SAQ Layout"
output: html_notebook
---

The State-Added-Questions layout is a .csv file. It is used to merge with the layout provided by CDC in variius files.





with the following columns ...

Field Name | Description
Num | THe local numbering used
description | the question as it was asked
col_name | the name of the column/field/variable
start | start position
end | end position
field_size | number of characters (size of field)

This would be the beginning of a saq layout file

Num,description,col_name,start,end,field_size
VI01.1,"In September of 2017, did you live in the United States Virgin Islands during landfall of Hurricanes Irma or Maria?",VIHURR01,901,901,1
